clang++ -g -arch x86_64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.1.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/Scacchi.dir/src/Pezzi/Alfiere.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Scacchi.dir/src/Pezzi/Cavallo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Scacchi.dir/src/Pezzi/Pedone.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Scacchi.dir/src/Pezzi/Re.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Scacchi.dir/src/Pezzi/Regina.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Scacchi.dir/src/Pezzi/Torre.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Scacchi.dir/src/Giocatore.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Scacchi.dir/src/Gioco.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Scacchi.dir/src/Pezzo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Scacchi.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o Scacchi
